original_snippet_context: Discussion of land ownership and immigration policies, mentioning the need to "fixar o immigrante ao solo."
relevant_quote: É preciso cuidar de fixar o immigrante ao solo, facilitando-lhe a acquisição da propriedade...
justification: While the phrase "fixar o immigrante ao solo" appears related to broader economic development goals that could align with expansionist monetary policy, this specific mention is about land ownership and immigration, not directly about the Caixa de Conversão or monetary issues.
